bodies.normalizedText:
SKILLS
including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, OEKO-TEX Standard 100, ISO 13485, and ISO 22716.
Mobile No: +91-8602148983 Email Id: Shee.singh10@gmail.com
DOB: 01/10/1995

SHEETAL SINGH
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced QA professional with a diverse background in Nonwoven technologies, including Spunbond and Carding Air-
Through Bonding (ATB), as well as perforated poly film manufacturing. Additional expertise in microbiological testing within
distillery and brewery environments, ensuring product safety and compliance with industry standards.
Qualified Internal Auditor for QAKE, with hands-on experience in supplier evaluation for raw materials and packaging
materials. Actively involved in preparing for and supporting audits aligned with international quality and regulatory standards,
Dedicated to maintaining the highest standards in product quality, process optimisation, and regulatory compliance, with a
strong focus on quality assurance and workplace safety across diverse manufacturing environments.
WORK EXPERIENCE
QUALITY ASSISTANT MANAGER
Safeco Hygiene Films Private Limited. Vadodara, Gujarat. Start Date: December 2025 to Current
o Leading the Quality Assurance team to ensure compliance with company standards, improve product
quality, and drive continuous process improvements for Brethable & Non Breathable Films.
SENIOR QA EXECUTIVE
Nanliu Manufacturing India Private Limited. Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Start Date: May 2024 to November 2025

o Responsible for conducting quality checks on all incoming raw materials, including staple fibres and
packaging materials, while overseeing supplier qualification and Yearly Supplier Audits and compliance
processes.
o Responsible for explaining and communicating technical standards for new or existing products handed over by the
customer to the production, sales and planning teams.
o Handling overall Complaints from Customers, and initiating Root cause analysis for complaints with relevant
departments. Further communication of Corrective and preventive actions to customers along with Effectiveness.
o Conducting Yearly SIP/Internal Audit based on QAKE and ISO, further forming audit observation reports.
o Review and track quality objectives monthly at the site, display progress regularly, and initiate corrective actions for any
unachieved targets.
o Statistical analysis of Quality Test Results for all products.
o Monthly connect with Customer and discuss ongoing Rejections, Breakdowns and action taken for complaints.
o Managing Document Control Centre (DCC) for the site, along with the Internal Health Check.
o Conducting Monthly 6s Audit for the site and preparation of audit reports and action effectiveness tracking.
o Random Inspection of the overall sites process from Input to output for their effectiveness.
o Tracking Sites Housekeeping & Pest Control program through Bi-weekly meetings with the agency and owner.
o Handling Lab Coop with P&G China site, and SOI Test sample collections and result tracking with Galab Lab.
o Handling Calibration of site equipment & Validation of Lab Testing Equipment.
o Independently manage customer visits on-site for Nonwovens and Wetwipes, document their observations, and
communicate feedback to all relevant departments through meetings.
o Conducted employee training sessions on quality and safety standards to maintain compliance and awareness.
QA EXECUTIVE
Jindal Polyfilms Limited. Nashik, Maharashtra. Start Date: Nov 2023 to May 2024.

o Led new product development based on customer requirements and market trends.
o Managed customer and consumer complaints, driving resolution through root cause analysis and cross-functional
collaboration.
o Key auditee for P&G QAKE, OEKO-TEX, IMS GMP, ISO, and customer/third-party audits.
o Ensured compliance with quality standards, regulatory requirements, and market expectations.
o Spearheaded process improvements and corrective actions to enhance product quality and customer satisfaction.

QC EXECUTIVE
SOM Distelleries & Breweries Limited. Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Start Date: Jan 2023 to Nov 2023.

o Conducted microbiological testing of beer, including raw materials, in-process samples, and finished products, to ensure
quality and safety standards.
o Monitored and analysed fermentation processes to identify and address microbiological deviations.
o Implemented and maintained aseptic practices across production areas to prevent contamination.
o Performed environmental monitoring of the plant, including water, air, and surfaces, to ensure compliance with GMP.
o Conducted yeast viability and vitality tests to optimise fermentation efficiency and product quality.
o Investigated microbial-related quality issues and collaborated with cross-functional teams for CAPA.
o Prepared and maintained microbiological reports and documentation for audits and compliance with ISO and GMP
standards.

QA ANALYST
Yanjan New Material India Private Limited. Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Start Date: March 2019 to Jan 2023.

o Complete Products Quality Lab Testing for Perforated Poly Films and generation of Reports.
o E-COA formation and release at the P&G portal.
o Sample Retention Room management and stored samples tracking, along with complete Lab Management.

MICROBIOLOGIST
MV Aqua Solutions Private Limited. Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Start Date: March 2018 to February 2019.

o As a Microbiologist in a water packaging plant, I ensured product safety and quality by conducting microbiological testing.
o Ensuring compliance with regulatory standards such as ISO and BIS.
TRAINING & WORKSHOP
o Participated in “ Suppliers Leadership Capability Boot Camp ” by P&G. (Aug. 18
th
to 19
th
2025)
o Participating in the First Time Manager Training program conducted by Inspire Consultancy Service Pvt Ltd. (Nov. 2024
to Jan. 2025)
o Undergone 6months of "Dissertation Training" at Hindustan Coca-Cola Beverage Pvt. Ltd., Bhopal.
o Undergone 15 days of "Training on Bioinformatics" at Barkatullah University, Bhopal (July'16)
o Training at Pinnacle Biomedical Research Institute (PBRI), Bhopal, on In-Vivo Experimentation and cytogenetics. (Jan
27
th
to Feb. 02
nd
2016)
o Attended "National Workshop & Training Programme “On "Recent Molecular& Biological Techniques” in Govt. Home
Science College, Hoshangabad, MP for 5 days (Dec'16)
o Attended Workshop on "Instrumentation & techniques in Biotechnology by“I.E.H.E. Bhopal. (Oct'15)
EDUCATION
o M.Sc. – Biotechnology I.E.H.E.
Bhopal
2015-2017
o B.Sc. – Biotechnology Govt. Home Science College
Hoshangabad
2012-2015
ACHIEVEMENTS
o Certified As ‘‘Quality Star” For the Year 2020-21 In Yanjan New Material Pvt. Ltd., Bhopal.
o Awarded For ‘‘Corona Warrior” For the Year 2020-21 In Yanjan New Material Pvt. Ltd., Bhopal.
o Certified As a ‘‘QAKE Internal Auditor’’ Trainer in Nanliu Manufacturing India Pvt. Ltd. (July 7
th
to July 9
th
2025)
INDUSTRIAL SKILLS
o Documentation, SOPs, Work instruction, & OPL.
o Audits ISO 9001:2015 ; 14001:2015; 45001:2018 and P&G QAKE.
o RCA, CAPA, 6W2H, 07-QC Tools, 8D.
o QACR-Quality Assurance Customer Relationship.
o FMEA, Pest control, Safety compliance.
